name: The Bankruptcy Law Firm, PLLC
description_short: Memphis-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, offering free consultations and post-bankruptcy credit rebuilding assistance.
description_long:
Bankruptcy Law Firm, PLLC is a legal practice based in Memphis, Tennessee that focuses exclusively on bankruptcy representation and filing services. The firm was established to serve individuals facing severe financial distress, including those dealing with overwhelming debt, wage garnishments, and eviction threats. Founded on the principle that bankruptcy filers deserve experienced legal guidance, the firm positions itself as a client-focused alternative to high-pressure or impersonal bankruptcy mills.

The firm offers comprehensive bankruptcy services covering both Chapter 7 (straight/fresh start bankruptcy) and Chapter 13 (wage earner) filings. Beyond the initial filing, Bankruptcy Law Firm, PLLC provides a "Life After Bankruptcy" program designed to help clients rebuild credit and develop financially responsible habits post-discharge. They offer free initial consultations and claim the ability to file bankruptcy on the same day as the consultation in urgent cases (such as foreclosure prevention or repossession avoidance). The firm also provides guidance on creditor interactions and stays current on changes to bankruptcy law.

The firm differentiates itself through several operational features: extended office hours to accommodate working clients, direct attorney representation rather than paralegal-only interactions, competitive fee structures with payment plans available, and emphasis on rapid processing for time-sensitive situations. Attorney Ursula Woods is featured as the primary lawyer handling both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 cases. The firm employs qualified paralegals and support staff and emphasizes patient, understanding client service.

As a legal practice, this firm is appropriate for individuals with substantial debt seeking formal bankruptcy protection rather than informal settlement. The primary limitation is geographic focus on the Memphis area, and the website provides limited detail about specific case outcomes, success rates, or client testimonials that would validate their claims of efficiency and service quality.
pros: Free initial bankruptcy consultation with no obligation
Same-day filing capability available in urgent foreclosure/repossession situations
Direct attorney representation—clients work with named lawyer (Ursula Woods) rather than paralegals only
Extended office hours beyond standard business hours for working clients
Competitive fee structure with payment plans offered for those with financial constraints
Post-bankruptcy credit rebuilding program ('Life After Bankruptcy') included
Handles both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings with current legal knowledge
cons: Website contains multiple spelling errors ('restablishing,' 'evicitons,' 'repsonsible') suggesting quality control issues
Limited transparency on fees—'competitive' and 'low price' are vague; actual costs not published
No client testimonials, case results, or success metrics provided to substantiate service quality claims
Appears to be single-attorney practice (Ursula Woods) limiting availability and capacity
No information about bankruptcy trustee relationships, creditor relationships, or local court experience
best_for: Memphis-area residents facing imminent foreclosure or vehicle repossession needing rapid bankruptcy filing
Individuals with wage garnishments seeking Chapter 13 wage earner plans to stop collection actions
Debtors who want direct attorney communication and involvement rather than paralegal-driven processes
People with limited ability to pay legal fees who need flexible payment arrangements
diagnosis: Best for Memphis residents facing imminent foreclosure, repossession, or wage garnishment who need rapid, direct legal representation for Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy. Primary caveat: the firm's website lacks transparency on actual fees, client outcomes, and attorney qualifications beyond the featured attorney's name, making it difficult to assess true value and capability compared to other bankruptcy providers.
services: Post-bankruptcy credit rebuilding program (Life After Bankruptcy)
Bankruptcy law updates and ongoing legal advice
Same-day bankruptcy filing in emergency cases
Financial counseling for post-discharge debt management
meta_description: Memphis-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings with credit rebuilding.
